analysis.reasoning: Core message: The author is meeting EU leaders about COVID-19, urges patience, discipline, and solidarity, and asserts that the EU is working hard on all aspects of the crisis. Evaluation per narrative: EU1 (EU as a successful story): Not invoked; no historical reflection or past successes. EU2 (EU is united): Implicit support via "discussing with EU leaders" and call for solidarity; suggests coordination and unity in responding to the crisis. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens): Yes; explicitly states "The EU is working hard on all aspects of the crisis," portraying a practical, proactive role addressing citizens’ concerns during COVID-19. EU4 (avant-garde actor): Not applicable; no pioneering policies mentioned. EU5 (global champion of fair causes): Not addressed. EU6 (contributes to a better world): Not addressed; focus is internal EU crisis management. Conclusion: Promotes EU2 and EU3.
